regionResolver.input: request/URL context + user prefs + IP hint
precedence: explicit country in URL (market-first routes pin the country)
constraints: explicit URL always wins; no hard redirects of indexed URLs by IP/browser language (dismissible suggestions only)
MI facts identical across language siblings of the same market page (LOCALE13)

renders: resolved region + resolution source + change control
MI decision surface: state badge, verdict, notices, checked date + confidence, reason-code copy
regionAvailabilityModule.drives: all OfferSurface instances on the page — one state top and bottom, no drift
regionAvailabilityModule.degradation: no decision record → UNKNOWN presentation, zero commercial controls, never a guess

offerGateChain.name: freshness
offerGateChain.rule: no STALE inputs; no unresolved critical conflict

offerGateRules: any broken link degrades to state-correct non-commercial presentation
one shared gate function; never re-implemented per page
GLOBAL fallback: globally advertised offers only, explicit non-local labeling, no local-eligibility claims

states.separationInvariant: availability, rankingEligibility, ctaEligibility, promoEligibility never collapsed

miBoundary: canonical MI cells/decisions → versioned read-only adapters → surfaces
UI never writes MI, never re-derives eligibility, never merges sources
GEO-legacy production path frozen until per-pair MIGRATION_7
prototypes bind visibly-marked mock data only
decision changes reach pages only through the MI lifecycle
affiliateBoundary: offer registry = implementation facts only; never eligibility evidence
/go/** only on fully authorized production surfaces; prototypes zero /go/** + inert CTAs
affiliate activation is a separate per-surface owner gate after migration + publication gates
countrySwitchFallbackOrder: 1 preserve current language when target pair AND that page's PageLocaleCoverage are LIVE
rule: visible fallback notice mandatory; unsupported URLs never silently serve another language (LOCALE19/LOCALE20); English never assumed market default (LOCALE24)
